**The problem**

<!-- What are you trying to do that Airlift makes hard or impossible today? -->

**What you'd like**

<!-- The behavior or feature you're imagining. -->

**Does it fit Airlift's scope?**

Airlift is an on-device, no-server bridge from the Google Health API into Apple
Health. Requests that keep it local, private, and focused are the best fit —
anything that needs a backend, telemetry, or a shared/hosted OAuth client is
likely out of scope (see the README's *OAuth & consent* section for why).

- [ ] This stays on-device (no server / no telemetry).

<!-- Optional: workarounds, other apps, native sync, etc. -->
